result.summary: interactivebrokers.co.uk publishes an API landing page and llms.txt that point developers to IBKR API documentation, but the documented programmatic endpoints and up-to-date API details resolve to other domains or local software rather than interactivebrokers.co.uk itself.
result.description: Interactive Brokers U.K. Limited is the UK entity of Interactive Brokers, an electronic brokerage service for trading and account management. Its UK site provides product, platform, and API information and routes educational/API documentation to IBKR Campus and related properties.
